THE RUM COCKTAIL

Bold.
Refreshing.
Unapologetic.

Premium rum meets refreshing iced tea and zesty lemonade. Crafted at 10% ABV — because a cocktail should feel like one.

With 14g of real sugar and 2.4 drinks per can, every sip is worth talking about.

1920

A Legend Found
in a Forgotten Vault.

After college, our founder David cracked open a prohibition-era safe in his grandmother's San Francisco basement and found a single yellowing paper. One word at the top: Snazzy.

"The cocktail everyone wanted, but no one could quite pin down."

We rebuilt the recipe, the richness, the attitude — and brought it back for now.
